context_text: In the civilized countries I believe there are no witches left, nor wizards, nor sorceresses, nor magicians.
normalized_context_text: In the civilized countries I believe there are no witches left, nor wizards, nor sorceresses, nor magicians.
original_context_text: In the civilized countries I believe there are no witches left, nor wizards, nor sorceresses, nor [[magicians]].
rendered_context_text: In the civilized countries I believe there are no witches left, nor wizards, nor sorceresses, nor magicians.
subject: a magician

context_text: "Well," he said with a sigh, "I'm not much of a magician, as I said; but if you will come to me tomorrow morning, I will stuff your head with brains.
normalized_context_text: "Well," he said with a sigh, "I'm not much of a magician, as I said; but if you will come to me tomorrow morning, I will stuff your head with brains.
